creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 214276
Crash with SteelSeries Siberia 350 USB gaming headset

Signed in to Windows 10 as an administrator. 

Computer Management running. 

Guest connection to SteelSeries Siberia 350, crash. 

root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ # date ; uname -v
Fri May  8 15:32:58 BST 2020
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #55 r360732: Thu May  7 09:31:34 BST 2020     root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG 
root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ # pkg query '%o %v %R' virtualbox-ose virtualbox-ose-kmod
emulators/virtualbox-ose 5.2.34_4 FreeBSD
emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod 5.2.34 poudriere
root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ #
